name: novyx-mcp
description: Persistent memory for AI agents. 23 MCP tools for remember, recall, rollback, audit, knowledge graph, and context spaces. Pairs with CLAUDE.md to give Claude Code shared memory across sessions and agents. Works locally with zero config (SQLite) or connects to Novyx Cloud for teams.

extras.local: Includes sentence-transformers for higher quality local embeddings

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Store a memory with tags, importance, and optional TTL

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Semantic search across stored memories

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Delete a specific memory by ID

tools.name: memories
tools.description: List all memories with optional tag filtering

tools.name: memory
tools.description: Get a single memory by ID

tools.name: rollback
tools.description: Undo operations after a timestamp (supports relative time like '5 minutes ago')

tools.name: audit
tools.description: View the full audit trail of memory operations

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Get memory statistics including count, importance distribution, and tags

tools.name: link
tools.description: Create a relationship link between two memories

tools.name: triple
tools.description: Add a subject-predicate-object triple to the knowledge graph

tools.name: triples
tools.description: Query the knowledge graph by subject, predicate, or object

tools.name: create_space
tools.description: Create an isolated context space for scoped memory

tools.name: list_spaces
tools.description: List all context spaces

tools.name: get_space
tools.description: Get details of a context space

tools.name: update_space
tools.description: Update a context space's name or description

tools.name: delete_space
tools.description: Delete a context space

tools.name: usage
tools.description: Check current tier, limits, and usage

tools.name: share_context
tools.description: Share a tagged set of memories with another user (cloud only)

tools.name: replay_timeline
tools.description: View the full timeline of memory changes (cloud only)

tools.name: replay_snapshot
tools.description: Get a point-in-time snapshot of all memories (cloud only)

tools.name: replay_lifecycle
tools.description: View the full lifecycle of a single memory (cloud only)

tools.name: replay_diff
tools.description: Compare memory state between two timestamps (cloud only)

tools.name: cortex_status
tools.description: Check background analysis status (cloud only)

prompts.name: memory_context
prompts.description: Inject relevant memories into the conversation context

prompts.name: knowledge_graph_context
prompts.description: Inject knowledge graph facts into context

prompts.name: memory_management
prompts.description: Guide for organizing and maintaining memories
